title: phreatia seleniglossa
intro: Phreatia seleniglossa, also known as the Moon-tongued Phreatia, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Island. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phreatia seleniglossa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and relieving symptoms associated with respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tea or tincture, with the roots and leaves being used to create a decoction or infusion.
